subcodes.first_line: O thou bewildered lover, become thou enraptured from the divine chalice and intoxicated with the wine of the eternal Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته سودائى از جام حق سرمست شو و از باده الست مدهوش و میپرست
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @love as fire
